metadata.description: Marketplace for the Modjo Sales Agent — a sales toolkit built on your Modjo workspace.

plugins.name: modjo-sales-agent
plugins.description: The Modjo Sales Agent — your Modjo data, automated. 19 skills across the rep's daily rhythm, per-deal execution, portfolio view, coaching, and post-sale, plus a router. Modjo MCP is the primary data layer; Notion optional for persistence; Gmail optional for drafting follow-ups in your voice; CSV paste-in onramp if you're not on Modjo yet.
